description: A widescreen photograph overlaid with bold text. The photo shows several Border Patrol and CBP agents in green and camouflage tactical uniforms and ball caps carrying a person on an orange rescue stretcher along a dirt agricultural road lined with green brush; in the background a white-and-red ambulance marked '911' waits with additional first responders, one wheeling an empty gurney. One agent at right wears blue medical gloves. The word 'RESCUE' is overlaid in very large bold white all-caps sans-serif across the left-center of the image. The lower-right corner carries the circular DHS and CBP eagle seal and the wordmark 'U.S. Customs and Border Protection.'
notable_text: RESCUE; U.S. Customs and Border Protection
